name: @clearline/data-access-org-notifications
description: Organization-notification-routing data-access layer for clearline-web (EPIC-CW-022 / US-CW-039): React Query hooks over /api/org-notifications for the budget-alert recipient list and the approval-queue reminder cadence. No UI, no business rules.

metadata.scope: Data-access lib for EPIC-CW-022 (US-CW-039 Organization Notifications).
